title: Barky Club Dog & Cat Harness Set – Adjustable Linen Leash, Collar & Harness – Breathable, Lightweight & Comfortable, Suitable for Small to Medium Pets (Blue, S)
features: Breathable Linen Material: Made from high-quality linen fabric, this harness set offers excellent breathability, keeping your pet cool and comfortable during walks and preventing discomfort from heat and moisture buildup.
Precise Adjustment & Easy to Wear: Each piece is fully adjustable to ensure a perfect fit for small to medium-sized dogs. It’s easy to put on and take off, making pet care hassle-free.

Lightweight Design, Pet-Friendly Comfort: The lightweight construction ensures that the harness, leash, and collar won’t weigh your pet down or cause any discomfort, allowing your pet to move freely without restriction.

Anti-Choke Handle Design: The leash features a specially designed anti-choke handle with soft padding, ensuring that long walks are comfortable for the pet owner without the risk of rope burns or discomfort.

Complete Set for a Unified Look: This matching 3-piece set – harness, leash, and collar – not only provides practicality but also a stylish and coordinated look, making your pet look great while being fully equipped for every outing.
description: Product Description Welcome to Barky Club Discover thoughtfully designed essentials for cats and dogs — including harness sets, collars, leashes, and retractable leads. Where comfort, safety, and style meet every walk.
